articles.title: FORECAST: ‘Michael’ to Dethrone ‘Mario’ as Box Office King
articles.teaser: Antoine Fuqua’s Michael Jackson biopic gets a big IMAX push this weekend, 30 years after a very different ‘Michael.’ Projections peg it at $65–85M—we’re sensing a little lower. Summer starts next weekend.

articles.title: 2026 Summer Forecast
articles.teaser: Something in the lineup feels like a warning. Our read on the summer slate — plus the ranked top 10, possible breakouts, and one intentional omission.

articles.title: ‘Mario’ Holds, ‘Hail Mary’ Enters Rare Territory, ‘Lee’ Crones
articles.teaser: We came in close on Super Mario Galaxy again — over by about $1 million on our forecast. Project Hail Mary enters rare company, and Lee Cronin’s Mummy lands on the soft side.

articles.title: FORECAST: Lee Cronin Battles Mario, Again
articles.teaser: Nothing too crazy happening this weekend. The holdovers continue to thrive, and a new horror film from Warner Bros shoots its shot ahead of the summer rush.

articles.title: ‘Mario’ Repeats, ‘Hail Mary’ Enters Rare Company
articles.teaser: Mario repeats at number one, Project Hail Mary crosses a rare milestone for an original sci-fi, and a few new platform releases test the waters.

articles.title: FORECAST: Holy Mario
articles.teaser: Super Mario Galaxy is poised to repeat at number one, with Project Hail Mary continuing its journey into the infinite. A Roman holiday may or may not happen, and Hoppers persists.
